The question aims to find out which competition, excluding the Women's National Basketball League, had the lowest average match attendance. We need to compare the average match attendance values in each row and exclude row 9 to determine the answer.

Excluding the women's National Basketball League, the competition with the lowest average match attendance is the A-League with 12,707.
